name: Renewal reminders
description: The condition trigger IS the reminder logic: tentative calendar events whose date falls within the next 14 days fire this, and the run briefs you on what's coming due — no wall-clock guesswork, the time semantics live in the data.
prompt: When a tentative calendar event's date comes within the next two weeks, brief me: what it is, when it's due, and how many days remain. These are the deadlines my documents produced — surface them, don't act on them.

vault.why: Watches tentative calendar events (the obligations your documents produced) coming due within 14 days and briefs you (issue #299 phase 4).
